name: DrawingObjectEnumerator
summary: The DrawingObjectEnumerator class provides the means to iterate through drawing object instances. Drawing object enumerators are generated by the container view and they contain drawing objects that are children of the container view instance.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Allows the usage of the foreach statement with DrawingObjectEnumerator.

methods.name: GetSize
methods.summary: Returns the total amout of items.

methods.name: MoveNext
methods.summary: Moves to the next item in the enumerator.

methods.name: Reset
methods.summary: Resets the enumerator to the beginning.
